title: 7 Herbal Infusions for Diabetics with Overeating Habits
description: Garcinia cambogia tinctures may help with overeating by slowing down the digestion of carbohydrates and suppressing appetite. The main constituents, such as hydroxycitric acid (HCA), inhibit the enzyme citrate lyase, which is involved in converting carbohydrates into fat. As a result, HCA reduces the production of fat cells and decreases the absorption of fat in the gut. This leads to a decrease in hunger and an increase in feelings of fullness.
